messages.subject: Stingray Control Tower — Remote AI Pump Control for ExxonMobil Field Operations
messages.content:
Dear ExxonMobil Operations Team,

ExxonMobil loses an estimated $2.3M per field per year in unplanned pump downtime. We built the solution.

Total Transformation Inc. (TTI) has deployed the Stingray Control Tower — an AI-powered remote monitoring and control platform for oil pumps and industrial infrastructure.

WHAT IT DOES:
• Remote start/stop/control of any pump from anywhere in the world
• AI predictive maintenance — detects failures 6-72 hours before they happen
• 60-second fault detection and autonomous response
• Full SCADA integration with existing systems
• Deploy in 48 hours — no infrastructure overhaul required

ROI: One prevented pump failure pays for 3 years of Stingray licensing.

We are offering ExxonMobil a 30-day pilot at no cost on 10 pump units. If we do not reduce your unplanned downtime by 80%, you pay nothing.

Demo: https://aaronreddix1987-sketch.github.io/stingray-control-tower.html

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO — Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com
